name: puppy no corn, wheat, soy chicken & brown rice recipe
description: hill’s science diet puppy no corn, wheat, soy dry food is rich in flavor & carefully formulated for the developmental needs of puppies, so they get the best start in life & grow to their full potential. formulated without corn, wheat, or soy dha from fish oil for healthy brain & eye development high-quality protein for building lean muscles balanced minerals for strong bones & teeth balanced nutrition for holistic health including added taurine
